Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. FFmpeg 101 (2024) 191 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Linux Applications Programming by Example: The Fundamental APIs (2nd Edition) 151 upvotes, 19 comments
  3. ZJIT removes redundant object loads and stores 54 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. Mamba-3 256 upvotes, 50 comments
  5. Ghostling 302 upvotes, 61 comments
  6. The seven hour explosion nobody could explain 29 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Blocking Internet Archive Won't Stop AI, but Will Erase Web's Historical Record 429 upvotes, 122 comments
  8. Show HN: Termcraft – terminal-first 2D sandbox survival in Rust 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. Meta's Omnilingual MT for 1,600 Languages 104 upvotes, 29 comments
  10. Some things just take time 342 upvotes, 117 comments
  11. Grafeo – A fast, lean, embeddable graph database built in Rust 129 upvotes, 41 comments
  12. Fujifilm X RAW STUDIO webapp clone 135 upvotes, 47 comments
  13. Molly guard in reverse 191 upvotes, 78 comments
  14. OpenCode – Open source AI coding agent 1160 upvotes, 569 comments
  15. Tinybox- offline AI device 120B parameters 27 upvotes, 7 comments
  16. Books of the Century by Le Monde 68 upvotes, 34 comments
  17. Thinking Fast, Slow, and Artificial: How AI Is Reshaping Human Reasoning 44 upvotes, 22 comments
  18. An industrial piping contractor on Claude Code [video] 119 upvotes, 75 comments
  19. 404 Deno CEO not found 212 upvotes, 150 comments
  20. A Japanese glossary of chopsticks faux pas (2022) 421 upvotes, 333 comments
  21. How Invisalign became the biggest user of 3D printers 83 upvotes, 58 comments
  22. Show HN: Joonote – A note-taking app on your lock screen and notification panel 19 upvotes, 11 comments
  23. Atuin v18.13 – better search, a PTY proxy, and AI for your shell 76 upvotes, 69 comments
  24. Electronics for Kids, 2nd Edition 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. Ubuntu 26.04 Ends 46 Years of Silent sudo Passwords 231 upvotes, 259 comments
  26. How we give every user SQL access to a shared ClickHouse cluster 55 upvotes, 59 comments
  27. A pig's brain has been frozen with its cellular activity locked in place 66 upvotes, 82 comments
  28. Mayor of Paris removed parking spaces, reduced the number of cars 177 upvotes, 260 comments
  29. How BYD got EV chargers to work almost as fast as gas pumps 67 upvotes, 98 comments
  30. Western carmakers' retreat from electric risks dooming them to irrelevance 114 upvotes, 214 comments

Last generated 4:30am, 22 March 2026. Source here.
